name: Classic double room
description: A calm, practical room for two guests with a soft sleeping area, private bathroom, and space to settle in after dinner or travel.
imageAlt: Classic double hotel room with warm lighting
body: This room is designed as a dependable everyday stay for couples, solo travelers, or business guests who want a quiet base near the restaurant.
Fresh linens, warm lighting, and simple in-room comforts make it easy to unpack, rest, and enjoy the stay at your own pace.
